prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small blue metal cylinder
  - obj_1: large yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_2: small cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small blue rubber sphere
  - obj_4: small green metal sphere
  - obj_5: small yellow rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: small red rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: small brown rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0141] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0142] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0143] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0147] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0148] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0149] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0150] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0151] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0152] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0153] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0154] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0155] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0156] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0157] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0159] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0160] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects in each scene image.

Looking at the images, I need to identify the objects and their positions carefully.

For questions qrr_0141 to qrr_0160, the scene appears to show the same set of objects from different viewpoints. Let me focus on the last image shown which has:
- obj_0: small blue metal cylinder
- obj_1: large yellow metal cylinder
- obj_2: small cyan rubber cylinder
- obj_3: small blue rubber sphere
- obj_4: small green metal sphere
- obj_5: small yellow rubber cylinder
- obj_6: small red rubber cylinder
- obj_7: small brown rubber sphere
- obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder

From the last image, I can estimate 3D positions:
- obj_8 (cyan metal): far left, middle depth
- obj_2 (cyan rubber): left area, front-middle
- obj_3 (blue sphere): behind, upper area
- obj_4 (green sphere): center-left
- obj_7 (brown sphere): center
- obj_5 (yellow rubber cylinder): front-center
- obj_6 (red rubber cylinder): right side
- obj_0 (blue metal cylinder): center-right
- obj_1 (large yellow metal cylinder): right, behind

Distance obj_0 to obj_8: These are moderately far apart (left to right spread).

Let me estimate distances for each question:

- qrr_0141: obj_0-obj_7 vs obj_6-obj_8. obj_0-obj_7 ~moderate, obj_6-obj_8 ~large. Answer: <
- qrr_0142: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_1-obj_2. Both seem large distances. ~=
- qrr_0143: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_1-obj_3. obj_1-obj_3 quite far. <
- qrr_0144: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_1-obj_4. Similar distances. ~=
- qrr_0145: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_1-obj_5. obj_1-obj_5 moderate. >
- qrr_0146: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_1-obj_6. obj_1-obj_6 moderate. >
- qrr_0147: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_1-obj_7. Similar. ~=
- qrr_0148: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_3. obj_2-obj_3 quite far. <
- qrr_0149: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_4. obj_2-obj_4 moderate. >
- qrr_0150: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_5. moderate distance. ~=
- qrr_0151: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_6. obj_2-obj_6 large. <
- qrr_0152: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_7. moderate. ~=
- qrr_0153: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_3-obj_4. obj_3-obj_4 moderate. >
- qrr_0154: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_3-obj_5. obj_3-obj_5 large. <
- qrr_0155: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_3-obj_6. large. <
- qrr_0156: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_3-obj_7. moderate. ~=
- qrr_0157: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_5. obj_4-obj_5 moderate. >
- qrr_0158: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_6. moderate. ~=
- qrr_0159: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_7. small-moderate. >
- qrr_0160: obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_5-obj_6. obj_5-obj_6 moderate. ~=
